# PictureInPicture2

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PictureInPicture2;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PictureInPicture2 { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
display, play, video, pop out, always on top, window, inset, multitask

## Categories
multimedia
